Chutes E2EE Chat

No API key configured.

Welcome to Chutes E2EE Chat. Your messages are encrypted end-to-end using ML-KEM-768 + ChaCha20-Poly1305. Only the TEE GPU instance can decrypt your prompts.

I learn from every conversation. Click the brain icon to see what I remember. I also handle hiccups automatically so we never lose momentum.

Web search auto · Deep search off · ML-KEM-768 · ChaCha20-Poly1305 · HKDF-SHA256 - End-to-end encrypted via Chutes.ai TEE
